10163975.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
10163975.transcript: Whoa, bud. Let me catch my breath first.

12537815.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
12537815.transcript: Ha! Another one bites the dust!

24436163.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
24436163.transcript: Bullet versus blade. Which one do you think will win?

27424048.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_box_check_l_3
27424048.transcript: Now there's a sight for sore eyes.

28255814.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
28255814.transcript: Dang, Gramps! You must do your push-ups!

39308818.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
39308818.transcript: We won't lose this time, Ed!

39333565.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
39333565.transcript: Hell of a mess we're in now, huh?

43580846.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
43580846.transcript: I got more where that came from!

43848829.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
43848829.transcript: Man, it is something else to see a legend in the flesh!

46830145.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
46830145.transcript: I'll tell you what's decided in a single moment: lunch. I'm starving.

48711349.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
48711349.transcript: Beat this thing and let's scram!

48858643.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
48858643.transcript: Thought your flames were hotter than that!

50178151.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
50178151.transcript: Locked out on that one. Keep your cool, will ya?

56700987.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
56700987.transcript: You never know what'll happen. Stay alert, folks!

59701087.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
59701087.transcript: None of these punks hold a candle to us!

66142950.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
66142950.transcript: Ha! Another one bites the dust!

67090469.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
67090469.transcript: Looks like we're out of the pan and into the fire. But here goes!

81000499.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
81000499.transcript: Man, this primal was a lot nicer the first time around.

82679281.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
82679281.transcript: Let's see you do that again!

88760042.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
88760042.transcript: The vacuum zone! Did that sound lame?

98939713.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
98939713.transcript: Damn... Can't we take some R&R instead?

125492379.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
125492379.transcript: Pilot 'em long enough, and you've basically become one.

140644006.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
140644006.transcript: Let's rip through these small fry!

149317118.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
149317118.transcript: We don't have time to play with these damn toys!

154007971.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
154007971.transcript: I bet you say that's all the helmsman!

160711520.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0000
160711520.transcript: We're in luck! Strong's my middle name!

162483279.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
162483279.transcript: Really went all out there, huh?

162629246.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
162629246.transcript: I guess my scruff's kinda droopy.

169593290.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
169593290.transcript: We got this in the bag!

176384621.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
176384621.transcript: Damn, Siegfried! That's what we call a wallop!

178406586.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
178406586.transcript: Right, so we headed to the monastery or what?

182579016.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
182579016.transcript: Ha ha! The old dog's got bite!

189509345.label: PL0300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_A
189509345.transcript: Oops! Did we piss him off?

193990510.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
193990510.transcript: That one got me revved up!

196146008.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
196146008.transcript: What kind of gunner would I be if I couldn't?

205013860.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
205013860.transcript: Hey, wanna teach me to box?

209909549.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
209909549.transcript: I'll bet it all on this bullet!

213483367.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
213483367.transcript: Have a taste of your own medicine, Lilith!

214629425.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
214629425.transcript: You gotta have good timing to land the Grand Cipher.

222701732.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
222701732.transcript: Oof! Rollin'... think I pulled a muscle there!

228889910.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A
228889910.transcript: Did the damn thing, didn't we?

233041431.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
233041431.transcript: Come on! Let's bring this sucker down!

248588347.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
248588347.transcript: We'll get you out of there! Promise!

274885843.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
274885843.transcript: No time to chicken out now!

284273372.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
284273372.transcript: All that frou-frou sword stuff really works!

299736738.label: PL0300_vo_ATK_charge_line_2
299736738.transcript: Bet it all on the bullet!

301338789.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
301338789.transcript: Boom! Now it's our turn to attack!

301913011.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
301913011.transcript: Couldn't have said it better myself!

310714630.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
310714630.transcript: Hang in there, Red! We're coming!

311368079.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
311368079.transcript: Only because you held down the front line.

312005434.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
312005434.transcript: Damn it, so close and now this!

315687239.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
315687239.transcript: I was just getting warmed up!

347025684.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
347025684.transcript: Yeah, yeah! Right, left, right, left! I got it!

348662516.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
348662516.transcript: You know, you're kinda scary when you talk to yourself.

350771529.label: PL0300_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_2
350771529.transcript: I feel like a million bucks!

352894315.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
352894315.transcript: Glad to help a legend like yourself!

374916885.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
374916885.transcript: Woo! Siegfried! You took us home there!

382962569.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
382962569.transcript: Tusslin' with a wind primal? Man, this takes me back.

387251459.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
387251459.transcript: Damn... Can't we take some R&R instead?

395800041.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
395800041.transcript: One more push, we're sitting pretty!

396352245.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
396352245.transcript: Let's head out before I have to re-clean my gun.

404891631.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
404891631.transcript: I eat punks like them for breakfast.

407663427.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
407663427.transcript: Ha! No need to thank me.

409889592.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
409889592.transcript: That was one for the books, eh?

410687844.label: PL0300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
410687844.transcript: Don't do anything rash. Got it.

411405329.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
411405329.transcript: You got some nerve trashing my ship!

415315370.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
415315370.transcript: Our crew's a force to be reckoned with!

418629146.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
418629146.transcript: Cag, a team player? Bet you hit your head.

420669808.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
420669808.transcript: I'll be there with bells on.

424275568.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
424275568.transcript: Sorry, but can we make this quick?

428421169.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
428421169.transcript: For the skies! For the people we love!

433054060.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
433054060.transcript: Look, buddy, we don't have to keep you in the crew.

441084084.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
441084084.transcript: We have to press on. Even if this place gives me the willies.

452152639.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
452152639.transcript: Once I got 'em in my sights, it's all over.

470869741.label: PL0300_vo_NAV_get_snp_3
470869741.transcript: Aww, just look at your wee pincers.

497549636.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
497549636.transcript: Come on! We can't lose to this maniac!

498685643.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
498685643.transcript: Ha! Not too bad, not too bad!

503293098.label: PL0300_vo_DMG_down_1
503293098.transcript: I'm beat. Let's finish this sucker!

514193070.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B
514193070.transcript: Y'all ain't duckin' outta my sights!

521604672.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
521604672.transcript: Look at all these targets! Easy as pie!

526408707.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
526408707.transcript: How do we beat this freak?

535437133.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
535437133.transcript: Oh yeah! We got the stuff!

537438017.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
537438017.transcript: Slow and steady wins the race.

546250442.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
546250442.transcript: We ain't goin' down without a fight!

549914087.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
549914087.transcript: You better make peace with the maker!

566008735.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
566008735.transcript: Guess things wouldn't go so easy.

567002559.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
567002559.transcript: Do your worst! We got your number!

580435222.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
580435222.transcript: Ha! Not too bad, not too bad!

583017107.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
583017107.transcript: You are a demon on the front line!

584836356.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
584836356.transcript: You know, I'm starting to get used to this place.

594652155.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0000
594652155.transcript: Not when I've got you to protect, little lady.

595103608.label: PL0300_vo_ATK_ability_5_3
595103608.transcript: Oh, I got the ammo to spare!

595807346.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
595807346.transcript: Mother of... Little warning before you zip around like that!

597975862.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
597975862.transcript: That's why I'm a straight shooter. In and out of the range.

599100972.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
599100972.transcript: Bunny ponchos or not, these folks mean business!

599727424.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
599727424.transcript: Eugen, my man! Well done, sir!

608252346.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
608252346.transcript: Okay, I'm calling you Hellcat from now on.

611378411.label: PL0300_vo_DMG_down_3
611378411.transcript: Time to put up or shut up!

622208970.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
622208970.transcript: You take this job seriously, huh?

623477616.label: PL0300_vo_ATK_ability_8_charge_2
623477616.transcript: Don't get caught in the blast!

625160534.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
625160534.transcript: Ride this momentum and smack him good!

627594675.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
627594675.transcript: How do you take out a living tower?

628922877.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
628922877.transcript: What if he'd rather fly with his ship and sleep with his teddy?

641933892.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
641933892.transcript: Alright, I admit I was holding back a little.

646036651.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
646036651.transcript: You know I hate it when you do that cute act.

658187002.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
658187002.transcript: Hey, time flies when you're sky-faring.

659727468.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
659727468.transcript: As if these eagle eyes are au naturel.

677801956.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
677801956.transcript: They train 'em different in the society, don't they?

688087089.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
688087089.transcript: Predict their moves and the battle's won!

691355614.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
691355614.transcript: Time to put up or shut up!

702146664.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
702146664.transcript: We gotta go after Lyria! Bring this pup down quick!

713930268.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
713930268.transcript: Come on! Can't let Gallanza have all the fun!

716307565.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_comeback_1
716307565.transcript: Thought you had me? Think again!

724459659.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
724459659.transcript: Well, if the Lord of Flame commands it.

752672695.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
752672695.transcript: Alright, let's blast this big boy!

754808954.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
754808954.transcript: Let's do it! Nothing can stop us!

755173115.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
755173115.transcript: Lots more where that came from!

767757622.label: PL0300_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_4
767757622.transcript: I owe those freaks a payback!

771883221.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
771883221.transcript: Turn up the heat! Break that barrier!

794871145.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
794871145.transcript: Move it, folks! No time to sit around and tan!

797522538.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
797522538.transcript: Gotta tough it out! That's all we can do!

801207981.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
801207981.transcript: Too late to turn back now!

812448597.label: PL0300_vo_DMG_down_2
812448597.transcript: Don't mind me, just trying to breathe!

814483153.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
814483153.transcript: After everything we've been through, nothing scares us anymore!

819788753.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
819788753.transcript: That coordination was muah! Chef's kiss!

824027561.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
824027561.transcript: A hundred skyfarers couldn't do what you did!

827167320.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
827167320.transcript: Mr. Fury! That's what I'm talking about!

830315653.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
830315653.transcript: Kill or be killed! Look alive!

834601620.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_comeback_2
834601620.transcript: I always get back up. Remember that.

848627901.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
848627901.transcript: Back away from the magic lady!

859448344.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_1_FIRST
859448344.transcript: Gonna wipe the smirk off his smug face!

862512922.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
862512922.transcript: You been holding out on us or what?

871999726.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
871999726.transcript: Yep. We got a job to finish.

873351328.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
873351328.transcript: Leave the cover fire to yours truly!

873373500.label: PL0300_vo_ATK_ability_6_2
873373500.transcript: Too late to run away, bud!

875968710.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
875968710.transcript: You could sound a little more enthused.

878376172.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
878376172.transcript: Ha! No need to thank me.

882875781.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
882875781.transcript: Of course. What did you expect?

885573518.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
885573518.transcript: Score one for the winning team!

888502338.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
888502338.transcript: You got problems? I got ammo.

896753458.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
896753458.transcript: Get the hell away from the Grand Cypher!

900816945.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
900816945.transcript: Hmph. Yep. I still got it.

904593666.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_1
904593666.transcript: Stuck the landing on that one!

911549211.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
911549211.transcript: This wild goose chase ends today!

920451920.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
920451920.transcript: Feel your heart flutter? I always did have that effect on people.

924026365.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
924026365.transcript: It costs zero rupees to not insult me.

925206387.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
925206387.transcript: Man, I would feel it for days if I fought like you.

945444123.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
945444123.transcript: Not bad! Not bad at all!

951244434.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
951244434.transcript: Just take out the core and we're home free!

959603202.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
959603202.transcript: We can win this! I know it!

960394649.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
960394649.transcript: Gotta be the big man and beat this pup!

963100132.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
963100132.transcript: How do you have so much energy, old man?

979452300.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
979452300.transcript: Okay, but don't blame me if I neck you.

980137259.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
980137259.transcript: Couldn't help but show off there!

981719728.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
981719728.transcript: Ha! No need to thank me.

996883475.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
996883475.transcript: Ha! Could barely keep an eye on ya!

997323033.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
997323033.transcript: You were gone in a blink, but I did my best.

1000500294.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
1000500294.transcript: Damn! Remind me not to piss you off!

1002682576.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
1002682576.transcript: Hey, the kids learned a few tricks!

1020782291.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
1020782291.transcript: Not bad. Not bad at all.

1022026736.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
1022026736.transcript: Now, thank you for holding the front down.

1026709300.label: PL0300_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
1026709300.transcript: Ha! Another one bites the dust!

1037484851.label: PL0300_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
1037484851.transcript: I don't like the looks of this.

1048396801.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
1048396801.transcript: Keep it up, and we'll win this day!

1061639318.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
1061639318.transcript: We have to protect this Sky Item! That's all that matters!

1068784987.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
1068784987.transcript: Out of our way, damn it!

1071009496.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
1071009496.transcript: Okay, maybe this guy still has a few tricks up his sleeve.

5863047.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
5863047.transcript: My bad. Remind me to grab a silencer next port.

63627110.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
63627110.transcript: You're gonna throw me off my game with a compliment like that.

69235032.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
69235032.transcript: Mess with ice, pay the price!

72566991.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
72566991.transcript: Guess we nip that in the bud.

118776009.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
118776009.transcript: Please! No helmsman worth his salt is scared of a little lightning!

124430810.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
124430810.transcript: Crap! Thanks for covering my six!

133256595.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
133256595.transcript: The pilot's gotta think fast and react faster!

133296217.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
133296217.transcript: If double the firepower's wrong, I don't wanna be right!

155348408.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
155348408.transcript: Just try not to punch the world in half.

158831406.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
158831406.transcript: Yeah, buddy! We make quite the storm surge, huh?

161722407.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
161722407.transcript: Hold on, big guy! I thought that was your job!

170422891.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
170422891.transcript: Hey, we're a pretty good team!

170814497.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
170814497.transcript: I coulda made that shot too.

179115700.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
179115700.transcript: Your quick thinking made it happen.

189145346.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
189145346.transcript: Wait! You think I blow myself up as a joke?

209500444.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
209500444.transcript: Uh, you don't always have to charge in, you know.

227761980.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
227761980.transcript: You got it! I'll make 'em tap dance!

230484340.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
230484340.transcript: With you plugging holes in the front line, I can plug holes in the enemy!

231097524.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
231097524.transcript: You wish you had moves as cool as mine!

293074985.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
293074985.transcript: Fighting with an archangel... it's weird how natural that feels.

304461227.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
304461227.transcript: You're like an armor-piercing round turned human!

308212751.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
308212751.transcript: Always an honor to fight alongside THE Dragon Slayer!

333463351.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
333463351.transcript: How would I know? You blasted them to pieces!

336330620.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
336330620.transcript: Whoa, whoa, kind of a personal question there.

366444175.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
366444175.transcript: Our enemies never stood a chance!

384634625.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
384634625.transcript: Damn! You really bring the pain!

451820406.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
451820406.transcript: No problem here. My eyes are peeled.

475709512.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
475709512.transcript: That's not as helpful as you think it is.

481681981.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
481681981.transcript: Hell yeah! Really gets the blood pumpin'!

491503548.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
491503548.transcript: Hey hey, friends just call me Rackam.

514383480.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
514383480.transcript: Kinda feel sorry for our enemies.

515180584.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
515180584.transcript: Man, what did this guy eat as a kid?

524910712.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
524910712.transcript: Appreciate the help! Thanks a billion!

530771109.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
530771109.transcript: You're a warhorse, Sovan. And it shows.

538404228.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
538404228.transcript: Hey, uh, just don't forget who your friends are.

557187428.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
557187428.transcript: Keep it up, Vane! Sky's the limit for ya!

557679946.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
557679946.transcript: Damn! Nothing gets past you, Charlotta!

615821011.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
615821011.transcript: I don't know. You see the big sky up there, and it just makes you wonder.

624895726.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
624895726.transcript: When do you ever use a light touch?

631346767.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
631346767.transcript: Always so colorful with the descriptions, aren't you?

632398517.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
632398517.transcript: Right? Don't sneeze at sky-dweller technology!

655286079.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
655286079.transcript: Nice! Just the kind of pizazz I'd expect from royalty!

657536644.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
657536644.transcript: Guess we'll head back while you mop up here, yeah?

657870008.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
657870008.transcript: Wish you'd freeze a sec, let me catch my breath.

660306765.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
660306765.transcript: That was almost too easy, wasn't it?

685896030.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
685896030.transcript: Oh man, ever thought about getting into ice sculpting?

710205003.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
710205003.transcript: I don't know. I've got things to do today.

735839033.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
735839033.transcript: Alright, you deserve a hand for that.

744502920.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
744502920.transcript: I see you go hard on the no guts, no glory school of thought.

749899552.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
749899552.transcript: Your kicks sure are something else.

750423897.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
750423897.transcript: Booyah! Try gettin' up from that!

766521872.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
766521872.transcript: Nice! You got the next one?

793971474.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
793971474.transcript: Flashy little number you pulled off there.

806932115.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
806932115.transcript: She's off in her own little battlefield.

830993829.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
830993829.transcript: Yeah, I still don't get it. What exactly is your darkness?

867434216.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
867434216.transcript: Nah, you're giving me too much credit.

889159759.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
889159759.transcript: Who'd have thought we'd form a dream team?

929634246.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
929634246.transcript: You miss the ones you don't take.

947435627.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
947435627.transcript: Just be more careful next time.

968391178.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
968391178.transcript: As long as you're on our side, I won't argue.

988890311.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
988890311.transcript: Man, you hit the mark like nobody's business!

996087056.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
996087056.transcript: Nice! I can always count on our resident alchemist!

1026803570.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
1026803570.transcript: Nice! Not half bad on the uptake!

1057124721.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
1057124721.transcript: Guess that's why you're one of the six.

1059685021.label: PL0300_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
1059685021.transcript: Can you not poke the bear?

170488023.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
170488023.transcript: So that was you holding back, wasn't it?

206014076.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
206014076.transcript: I'll take an Eternal's approval any day.

258413333.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
258413333.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

297266640.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
297266640.transcript: How do you make each arrow seem like a shotgun blast?

357242892.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
357242892.transcript: Thanks. Took me long enough to keep up with you.

363072892.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
363072892.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six!

369575478.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
369575478.transcript: Damn, am I glad you're on our side!

376818373.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
376818373.transcript: Ugh, I think I know how they feel.

431468990.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
431468990.transcript: I think the word you're looking for is bullseye.

529695951.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
529695951.transcript: Let's do this. One, two, three, four, five, six. Phew.

565886184.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
565886184.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

708568208.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
708568208.transcript: C'mon, I'm doing my best here!

965055465.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
965055465.transcript: You had every corner of this battlefield covered.

91626777.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2100
91626777.transcript: Yeesh, just how strong are ya?

393230657.label: PL0300_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
393230657.transcript: Right? Really outdid myself on that one.

968957340.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
968957340.transcript: This'll have to do. Better than I thought.

975046366.label: PL0300_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
975046366.transcript: Chow time! Just like mama makes.
